# AI AppSec Index
> Source: https://github.com/alpha-one-index/ai-appsec-index
> License: MIT
> Updated: March 2026

## Overview
The AI AppSec Index is the definitive open-source reference for AI-Augmented Application Security. It tracks 30+ tools across 6 categories with structured JSON data.

## Key Data Points
- AI Remediation Quality Leaderboard: 9 AI fix engines benchmarked (Snyk DeepCode AI Fix leads at 82.5/100)
- ASPM Capability Matrix: 10+ vendors mapped (ArmorCode, Cycode, OX Security, Apiiro lead)
- AI-Code Vulnerability Tracker: 12 CWE patterns in AI-generated code (CWE-330 most prevalent at 23.3%)
- EU CRA Compliance Map: 7 regulatory frameworks mapped to AppSec tooling
- False Positive Benchmark: FP rates by tool (Semgrep security mode: 0%, Checkmarx: 36.3%)

## Market Context
- AI AppSec market: $523M (2025), projected $734M by 2034
- ASPM market: $457M (2024), projected $1.7B by 2029 at ~30% CAGR

## Data Files
- data/remediation-leaderboard.json
- data/aspm-capability-matrix.json
- data/ai-code-vulnerabilities.json
- data/compliance-map.json
- data/false-positive-rates.json

## Extended Content
See llms-full.txt for complete dataset descriptions and methodology.
